title: Frosty Biome
description: This mod adds a new biome called: Frosty Biome
body:
This mod adds a new biome into minecraft called Frosty Biome

The new biome adds:

- Snommen
- A new type of Snow Golem
- Frosty Zombie
- Frosty Skeleton
- Frosty Creeper
- Frozen Ore
- Frozerald
- Frozen Tools And Weapons
- Raw Snom
- Snom
- Fur
- Fur Boots

Hope you enjoy this mod :D
